extra_lines: L33 ALWAYS-CLOTHED HARD: Beatrix stays fully clothed throughout. Cream high-collared blouse, long charcoal pencil skirt, low brown heels. Garments may strain, seams may pop open at the deltoids (panels 7+), top button may pop (panels 8+), skirt slit may widen showing quad flex (panel 9+), but breasts / groin / glutes remain fully covered at every tier.

L17 BEATRIX CANONICAL ANCHOR: Every face-visible panel shows Beatrix with auburn/copper hair (panels 1-3: tight low bun at nape; panels 4-6: bun loosening, wisps escaping; panels 7-10: hair fully down past shoulders), green eyes, fair skin with light freckles across cheekbones and nose, age 28, round wire-rim glasses ALWAYS present on her face across every panel (canonical — keep through transformation peak), strikingly beautiful, intelligent expression, English-rose complexion.
L21 REFERENCE EXCLUSION: Attached refs are guidance only — never as physical scene objects.
L22 HAIR STATE EXPLICIT: Every face-visible panel names the hair state per the panel-specific schedule above. Auburn/copper color throughout.

L23 ENV VERBAL ANCHOR (Victorian library): When env ref dropped: dusty Victorian university library, towering dark wooden bookshelves reaching ceiling, brass reading lamps with green glass shades, leather button-back chairs, stained glass arched windows casting amber afternoon light beams with floating dust motes, long oak reading table with scattered open leather books, antique globe in background.

L24 ACCESSORY SUPPRESSION: Round wire-rim glasses and antique brass watch-on-chain are CANONICAL and kept across panels. Suppress hallucinated modern jewelry / rings / earrings / smart-watches / necklaces.
L29 TIER REINFORCEMENT: Sample caps at tier 5 — no tier-6+ reinforcement refs needed. The tier-5 panels (9-10) match the body-tier lineup tier-5 figure.

PHOTOREAL CGI / DAZ3D STYLE: All renders photoreal DAZ3D / Iray with PBR materials, 8K textures. Glowing rune = warm gold-amber light with volumetric glow. 2D scope is captions only on panels 4, 7, 10.
BEAUTY ANCHORING: Beatrix renders strikingly beautiful — English-rose vogue-glamour beauty, freckles enhance not detract, intelligent expression.
CHEST OVERSIZE COMPENSATION: Tier 3 onward prompt for chest size LARGER than lineup. Bust scales with muscle.
AUTONOMOUS VARIANT SELECTION: Autopilot, no mid-run asks.
DIALOGUE MODE MINIMAL — captions on panels 4, 7, 10 only (L19 flat 2D overlay).

TONE — SCHOLARLY REALIZATION: Beatrix analyzes what is happening to her even as it happens. Expression arc: focused → puzzled → curious → fascinated → understanding → satisfied. Never afraid, never panicked. She is a scholar witnessing her own transformation as an experimental subject.
